case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY $25.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $140.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
